title: Cut & Beveled
description: A Dark GUI pack focused on making a sleek and beveled look
body:
![Title card displaying "Cut and Beveled"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd3ac1610d4af3f2342df566082a72a91cfd4e16.png)
A Dark GUI pack for 1.13 and above! Currently updated to the Tiny Takeover Drop! Featuring a dark blue-ish grey base with light green highlights to be a little softer on the eyes. This pack aims to create a more angular and geometric look for Minecraft's GUI.

![Title Card displaying the text, Mod Compat.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78e83c1e9fac074d8ea7cb5cb17a6d6001a661e7.png)
I often play modded Minecraft. So Cut & Beveled is compatible with some mods as well! (with some more on the way)
| Currently Compatible:             | Working on:              | Future (maybe):              |
|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|
| Appleskin            | Journey Map             |    Cobblemon      |
| Simple Voice Chat            | Curios              |      Mekanism        |
|    Nemo's Inventory Sorting         |               |       Thaumcraft       |
| Create | | Tinker's Construct (Hephaestus for Fabric) |
| JEI | |
| JER | |
| Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks | |
| Alex's Caves | |
| Alex's Mobs | |
| Archeological | |
| Axiom | |
| Brewin and Chewin | |
| Caverns and Chasms | |
| Clayworks | |
| Cloth Config (2?) | |
| Corpse | |
| Farmer's Delight | |
| Miner's Delight | |
| Sophisticated Core | |

If you have any issues with the pack, or have any mods you want added, you can contact me at my Discord, @retro_biz, or email me directly at retrodoesart@gmail.com.
